comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: Nested if/else for status check could be simplified - Consider using early return pattern to reduce indentation depth and improve readability. Current structure checks one condition and nested nested another - LBYL pattern would be: check planning status first, return early if true, then handle the else branch without nesting.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Refactored: hoisted `min_status` computation and flattened to if/elif/else chain, reducing one nesting level. Fixed in b6ff1e46e.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-25 05:54 PST_
